languages.text: "Дом это наш, Ваша Светлость. Тут все или ядовитое, или хищное, или хрупкое. Словом, то что не пытается тебя убить — просто притворяется. Но к этому привыкаешь. А потом учишься использовать. Ядовитое? Значит, можно пустить на лекарства. Хищное? Значит, съедобно. Сложно прикончить? Наверняка его шкура сгодится на броню".

"It's our home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is only pretending to be safe. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for medicine. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use its skin for armour."
languages.original_text: "Дом это наш, Ваша Светлость. Тут все или ядовитое, или хищное, или хрупкое. Словом, то что не пытается тебя убить — просто притворяется. Но к этому привыкаешь. А потом учишься использовать. Ядовитое? Значит, можно пустить на лекарства. Хищное? Значит, съедобно. Сложно прикончить? Наверняка его шкура сгодится на броню".

languages.text: 「ここは私の家です。毒のあるもの、捕食するものが、壊れやすいもの。つまり、あなたを殺そうとしないものは、ただ無害であるふりをしているのです。でも、慣れます。そして、それを使いこなすのです。毒があるなら、薬の材料に。捕食するなら、食べられます。殺しにくいなら、鎧に使えるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "It's home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is just pretending to be innocent. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for reagents. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use it for armour."

languages.text: "Burası bizim evimiz {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Buradaki her şey ya zehirli, ya yırtıcı ya da kırılgandır. Kısacası bir şey sizi öldürmeye çalışmıyorsa mutlaka iyi numarası yapıyordur. Duruma alışıyorsunuz. Sonra da faydalanmayı öğreniyorsunuz. Zehirli mi? O zaman ilaç olarak kullanabilirsiniz. Yırtıcı mı? Yenilebilir yani. Öldürmesi zor mu? Muhtemelen derisi zırh yapımında iş görecektir."
languages.original_text: "It's our home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is only pretending to be safe. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for medicine. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use its skin for armour."

Kısacası bir şey sizi öldürmeye çalışmıyorsa mutlaka iyi numarası yapıyordur. Duruma alışıyorsunuz. Sonra da faydalanmayı öğreniyorsunuz. Zehirli mi? O zaman ilaç olarak kullanabilirsiniz. Yırtıcı mı? Yenilebilir yani. Öldürmesi zor mu? Muhtemelen derisi zırh yapımında iş görecektir."

languages.text: “这是我们的家园，大人。这里的一切要么有毒，要么掠食成性，要么脆弱不堪。说白了，那些表面无害的也只是在装无辜罢了。但你总会习惯，并能学会利用它们。有毒？那就能拿来当药。掠食成性？那说明能吃。很难杀死？那多半能剥了它的皮做护甲。”
languages.original_text: "It's our home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is only pretending to be safe. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for medicine. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use its skin for armour."

traits.locale_text: “这是我们的家园，大人。这里的一切要么有毒，要么掠食成性，要么脆弱不堪。说白了，那些表面无害的也只是在装无辜罢了。但你总会习惯，并能学会利用它们。有毒？那就能拿来当药。掠食成性？那说明能吃。很难杀死？那多半能剥了它的皮做护甲。”

languages.text: "Das ist unsere Heimat, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Hier ist alles entweder giftig, räuberisch oder schwach. Alles, was nicht versucht, Euch zu töten, gibt nur vor, sicher zu sein. Aber daran gewöhnt man sich. Und dann lernt man, es zu nutzen. Etwas ist giftig? Dann stellt Medikamente daraus her. Räuberisch? Dann kann man es essen. Schwer zu töten? Dann taugt es vermutlich als Rüstung."
languages.original_text: "It's our home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is only pretending to be safe. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for medicine. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use its skin for armour."

Alles, was nicht versucht, Euch zu töten, gibt nur vor, sicher zu sein. Aber daran gewöhnt man sich. Und dann lernt man, es zu nutzen. Etwas ist giftig? Dann stellt Medikamente daraus her. Räuberisch? Dann kann man es essen. Schwer zu töten? Dann taugt es vermutlich als Rüstung."

languages.text: « C'est notre foyer, Votre Seigneurie. Ici, tout est soit toxique, soit agressif, soit fragile. Tout ce qui n'essaie pas de vous tuer fait simplement semblant d'être inoffensif. Mais on finit par s'y habituer et par apprendre à l'apprivoiser. C'est venimeux ? Ça peut servir à préparer des médicaments. C'est prédateur ? Alors, c'est mangeable. C'est difficile à tuer ? Ça veut dire que sa peau peut servir à fabriquer des armures. »
languages.original_text: "It's our home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is only pretending to be safe. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for medicine. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use its skin for armour."

traits.locale_text: « C'est notre foyer, Votre Seigneurie. Ici, tout est soit toxique, soit agressif, soit fragile. Tout ce qui n'essaie pas de vous tuer fait simplement semblant d'être inoffensif. Mais on finit par s'y habituer et par apprendre à l'apprivoiser. C'est venimeux ? Ça peut servir à préparer des médicaments. C'est prédateur ? Alors, c'est mangeable. C'est difficile à tuer ? Ça veut dire que sa peau peut servir à fabriquer des armures. »

languages.text: «Es nuestro hogar, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Aquí todo es venenoso, depredador o frágil. En resumen, si algo no intenta matarle es que está fingiendo ser seguro. Pero es cuestión de acostumbrarse. Y de aprender a aprovecharlo todo. ¿Es venenoso? Entonces sirve para preparar medicina. ¿Es depredador? Entonces se puede comer. ¿Cuesta matarlo? Su piel probablemente sirva como armadura».
languages.original_text: "It's our home, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Everything here is either poisonous, predatory, or fragile. In short, anything that isn't trying to kill you is only pretending to be safe. But you get used to it. And then you learn how to use it. Poisonous? Then you can use it for medicine. Predatory? Means it's edible. Hard to kill? You can probably use its skin for armour."
